name: @lgcyaxi/oh-my-claude
description: Multi-agent orchestration plugin for Claude Code with multi-provider support

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts src/cli/cli.ts --outdir dist --target node
scripts.build:mcp: bun build src/mcp/server/index.ts --outdir dist/mcp --target node && mv dist/mcp/index.js dist/mcp/server.js && bun run scripts/copy-wasm.ts
scripts.build:hooks: bun build src/hooks/pre-tool-use/comment-checker.ts src/hooks/stop/todo-continuation.ts src/hooks/post-tool-use/task-notification.ts src/hooks/pre-tool-use/task-tracker.ts src/hooks/user-prompt-submit/memory-awareness.ts src/hooks/post-tool-use/session-logger.ts src/hooks/stop/context-memory.ts src/hooks/user-prompt-submit/preference-awareness.ts src/hooks/post-tool-use/post-tool.ts --outdir dist/hooks --entry-naming [name].js --target node
scripts.build:statusline: TS=$(date +%s) && bun build src/statusline/statusline.ts --outdir dist/statusline --target node --define "__OMC_BUILD_HASH__='$TS'"
scripts.build:proxy: bun build src/proxy/server.ts src/proxy/dashboard.ts --outdir dist/proxy --target bun
scripts.build:all: bun run build && bun run build:mcp && bun run build:hooks && bun run build:statusline && bun run build:proxy && bun run build:web
scripts.test:smoke:coworker: bun run test:smoke:codex && bun run test:smoke:opencode
scripts.install-local: bun run build:all && npm link && bun run src/cli/cli.ts install
scripts.install-local:force: bun run build:all && npm link && bun run src/cli/cli.ts install --force
scripts.menubar:dev: cd apps/menubar && bun run tauri dev
scripts.menubar:build: cd apps/menubar && bun run tauri build
